name: games played with multiple rate types
description: Test case for games played with multiple rate types
expected_query: with "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.nfl_team) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" as materialized (select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS m_33f2f8aa0da1 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid), "rate_aggregate_09f571a52cb3" as materialized (select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS m_33f2f8aa0da1 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid) select "player"."pid", "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."rate_type_total_count" AS "games_played_0", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379.m_33f2f8aa0da1) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rec_yds_from_plays_0, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_09f571a52cb3.m_33f2f8aa0da1) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rec_yds_from_plays_1, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" on "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" on "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_09f571a52cb3" on "rate_aggregate_09f571a52cb3"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."rate_type_total_count", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 3 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
